Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 92 

DOSAGE_FORM_CD 

LABEL: Medication Dosage Form Code 

DESCRIPTION: The physical form of a dose of medication, such as a capsule or injection. 

SHORT NAME: DOSAGE_FORM_CD 

LONG NAME: DOSAGE_FORM_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: 01 = Capsule 
02 = Ointment 
03 = Cream 
04 = Suppository 
05 = Powder 
06 = Emulsion 
07
